# Feature: Collection Persistence for WS/SSE

## 1. Feature Goal

**ID**: FEAT-010
**Source Plan**: `.spec-lite/plan_websocket_sse.md`

Ensure WebSocket (WS) and Server-Sent Events (SSE) requests are persisted in collection JSON files with full protocol fidelity, and can be loaded back into tabs without losing protocol-specific behavior. This includes protocol-safe save/load normalization, backward compatibility for legacy HTTP entries (no `protocol` field), and parity across Web and VS Code save pipelines.

## 2. Data Model (Granular)

> `.spec-lite/data_model.md` does not exist. This feature defines a granular JSON persistence model based on the plan's conceptual model.

### Entities & Attributes

- **PersistedCollection** (existing collection file payload):
  - `info.waveId` (string) - collection identity (required)
  - `info.name` (string) - display name (required)
  - `info.version` (string) - storage version marker
  - `item` (CollectionItem[]) - recursive folder/request tree

- **PersistedCollectionItem** (recursive node):
  - `id` (string) - stable item identity (required)
  - `name` (string) - folder/request label (required)
  - `item?` (PersistedCollectionItem[]) - nested folder children
  - `request?` (PersistedAnyRequest) - protocol-discriminated request payload

- **PersistedHttpRequest**:
  - `id` (string)
  - `name` (string)
  - `protocol?` ('http') - optional for backward compatibility
  - `method` (string) - default `GET` when missing
  - `url` (CollectionUrl | string)
  - `header?` (HeaderRow[])
  - `query?` (ParamRow[])
  - `body?` (CollectionBody)
  - `validation?` (RequestValidation)
  - `description?` (string)
  - `authId?` (string)
  - `sourceRef?` (CollectionReference)

- **PersistedWsRequest**:
  - `id` (string)
  - `name` (string)
  - `protocol` ('ws')
  - `url` (CollectionUrl | string)
  - `header?` (HeaderRow[])
  - `query?` (ParamRow[])
  - `description?` (string)
  - `authId?` (string)
  - `sourceRef?` (CollectionReference)
  - Constraint: must not persist HTTP-only fields (`method`, `body`, `validation`)

- **PersistedSseRequest**:
  - `id` (string)
  - `name` (string)
  - `protocol` ('sse')
  - `method` (string) - default `GET` when missing
  - `url` (CollectionUrl | string)
  - `header?` (HeaderRow[])
  - `query?` (ParamRow[])
  - `body?` (CollectionBody)
  - `description?` (string)
  - `authId?` (string)
  - `sourceRef?` (CollectionReference)
  - Constraint: must not persist `validation`

- **PersistedAnyRequest**:
  - `CollectionRequest | WsCollectionRequest | SseCollectionRequest`

### Relationships

- PersistedCollection 1:N PersistedCollectionItem via `item[]`
- PersistedCollectionItem 0..1:1 PersistedAnyRequest via `request`
- PersistedAnyRequest 0..1:1 CollectionReference via `sourceRef`

### Indexes & Constraints

- No database indexes (JSON file storage).
- Required invariants:
  - Missing `protocol` is treated as HTTP during load normalization.
  - `protocol: 'ws'` payloads are sanitized to WS-safe shape.
  - `protocol: 'sse'` payloads are sanitized to SSE-safe shape.
  - Runtime-only metadata is not persisted inside `request` payloads.

## 3. Files

List of files expected to be created or modified for this feature:

- `packages/core/src/types/collection.ts` - tighten persistence discriminants and protocol-safe comments/JSDoc
- `packages/core/src/utils/collectionParser.ts` - protocol-aware extract/serialize helpers for collection items
- `packages/core/src/hooks/store/createRequestTabsSlice.tsx` - tab-to-collection serialization and collection-to-tab hydration fidelity
- `packages/web/src/components/RequestEditor.tsx` - save callback typing to protocol union
- `packages/vscode/src/webview/RequestEditor.tsx` - save callback typing to protocol union
- `packages/web/src/App.tsx` - protocol-union save flow and metadata update
- `packages/vscode/src/webview/App.tsx` - protocol-union save flow and metadata update
- `packages/web/src/adapters/webAdapter.ts` - transport payload parity for protocol unions
- `packages/vscode/src/webview/adapters/vsCodeAdapter.ts` - transport payload parity for protocol unions
- `packages/server/src/routes/collections.ts` - request-save API typing aligned to protocol unions
- `packages/shared/src/types.ts` - export protocol-union request types for shared services
- `packages/shared/src/services/CollectionService.ts` - persistence normalization and sanitization at save/load boundaries
- `packages/core/src/test/utils/collectionParser.test.ts` - protocol-aware parser tests
- `packages/core/src/test/hooks/store/createRequestTabsSlice.test.ts` - protocol round-trip tests
- `packages/shared/src/test/services/CollectionService.test.ts` - save/load normalization tests for WS/SSE and legacy HTTP
- `packages/web/src/test/adapters/webAdapter.test.ts` - save payload tests for protocol unions
- `packages/vscode/src/test/handlers/MessageHandler.test.ts` - save forwarding tests for protocol union payloads

## 4. Dependencies

- FEAT-001 (Protocol Types & Core Data Model) - complete
- FEAT-002 (Realtime State Slice) - complete
- FEAT-003 (Protocol Selector & Conditional Editor Shell) - complete
- FEAT-008 (VS Code Adapter - Realtime Integration) - complete
- FEAT-009 (Web Adapter + Server Routes) - complete

## 5. Implementation Tasks

### TASK-001: Protocol-union save contract from editor to app handlers

- [ ] **Implementation**: Update save function contracts to `AnyCollectionRequest` (not HTTP-only `CollectionRequest`) across both platform UIs. Align `RequestEditor` props and app-level `handleSaveRequest` logic in Web and VS Code so WS/SSE requests flow through save without narrowing/casts. Preserve source reference and folder metadata update behavior.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add/extend component/store tests to verify save actions are invoked with WS and SSE payloads, including protocol-specific fields (`protocol`, SSE `method`, WS no `method/body/validation`).
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Add JSDoc for save handlers clarifying that save accepts the full request union and is protocol-discriminated.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter wave-client-web test` and `pnpm --filter wave-client-vscode test` with targeted save-flow tests passing.

### TASK-002: Shared persistence normalization at storage boundaries

- [ ] **Implementation**: In `CollectionService`, add protocol-aware request normalization/sanitization helpers and apply them on both read and write paths (`loadOne`, `loadAll`, `import`, `saveRequest`). Rules: missing protocol defaults to HTTP; WS strips HTTP-only fields; SSE strips validation and defaults method to GET when absent; HTTP keeps existing shape. Update shared type exports to include protocol union request types.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add tests proving: (1) WS request round-trips with `protocol: 'ws'` and no HTTP-only fields, (2) SSE round-trips with `protocol: 'sse'` and method/body retained, (3) legacy entries without protocol are normalized to HTTP, (4) mixed collections load with stable IDs and normalized request payloads.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: JSDoc for normalization helpers documenting backward-compatibility and sanitization guarantees.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/shared test` and confirm CollectionService tests pass.
- **Depends on**: TASK-001

### TASK-003: Web and VS Code transport parity for request persistence

- [ ] **Implementation**: Ensure adapter and backend transport layers forward protocol-union payloads unchanged during save: web adapter `/api/collections/:filename/requests`, VS Code webview adapter `saveRequestToCollection`, server collection route DTO typing, and extension message handling path. Remove any HTTP-only assumptions in request-content typing.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add adapter/handler tests validating save payloads for WS and SSE requests include required protocol fields and are forwarded correctly to storage service APIs.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Inline comments/JSDoc in adapter and route code describing request-content contract as `AnyCollectionRequest`.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter wave-client-web test`, `pnpm --filter wave-client-vscode test`, and `pnpm --filter @wave-client/server test` (or route-targeted tests) successfully.
- **Depends on**: TASK-002

### TASK-004: Collection item round-trip fidelity (extract <-> save <-> load)

- [ ] **Implementation**: Harden `extractRequestFromItem` and `requestToCollectionItem` behavior for protocol unions, ensuring runtime-only fields are stripped correctly while protocol-specific fields survive round-trip. Confirm `loadRequestIntoTab` and `getCollectionRequest` preserve protocol fidelity for persisted WS/SSE items.
- [ ] **Unit Tests**: Add core tests covering end-to-end round-trip per protocol: collection item -> tab -> collection request -> collection item. Include assertions for `sourceRef`, URL/query/header fidelity, and protocol-specific field inclusion/exclusion.
- [ ] **Documentation Update**: Update utility JSDoc to explicitly define which fields are persisted vs runtime-only.
- **Verify**: Run `pnpm --filter @wave-client/core test` and confirm new round-trip tests pass.
- **Depends on**: TASK-003

## 6. Cross-Cutting Concerns

- **Auth**: Persist only `authId` references; never persist resolved credentials or secret token values in collection files.
- **Error Handling**: Use `Result<T, string>` through adapter/service boundaries; reject malformed protocol payloads with explicit error messages and do not silently coerce unsafe shapes.
- **Logging**: Log persistence failures with context (`collectionFilename`, `requestName`, `protocol`) while excluding request secrets and auth material.
